violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer broken down and moved to the ware-washing area to be washed, rinsed, and santized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Tomatoes were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the front cold well. The tomatoes were observed in the cold well on top of a plastic divider. The plastic divider was removed to allow for proper airflow. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation food debris: 1) The bottom of the prep tables 2) The flip top prep unit 3) The knife rack 4) The side of the grill The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The dumpster area outside was observed with an accumulation of debris. The refuse areas must be maintained to prohibit and harborage conditions that may attract any pests. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles above the food prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of the display cooler, sandwich prep unit and beverage coolers have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
